runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 450m in 25.57. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 450m at this track at SE level. Tested under these conditions.

runners.formComment: Poor last start but ran a better race two back when fourth over 390m at Shepparton. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.23 last start, beating Jorogumo. Unbeaten in two starts from this draw. Key runner.

runners.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Healesville when a 3 length third but did clock a fast 16.71 over the 300m trip. Can slot into the minors again.

runners.formComment: A slick 22.19 over the 390m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crossed out and collided turning into back straight.

runners.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 10 over 400m at Warragul in a Free For All. Looks tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 10 over 400m at Warragul in a Free For All. Looks tested in this company.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th on April 12 over 300m at Healesville behind High End Cash beaten 1.75 lengths (17.00) in a Grade 5 H. Has a superb 21.95 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.
